content.scenarioHint: 你在Instagram上分享了一张新照片，想确认朋友是否关注了你，用轻松非正式的语气询问。

options.text: Hey, have you followed me on Instagram? I just posted a pic of the new brunch spot!
Do you think my Instagram account is worth following?
I posted something cool—did you see it?
You should follow me—I post great photos.

content.explanation: 正确答案直接、自然地询问对方是否关注，符合非正式语境且明确指向Instagram关注行为。选项2是间接评价账号价值，而非确认关注状态；选项3只问是否看到，未提及关注；选项4是建议而非提问，不符合‘user_asks’模式要求。

options.text: I saw it on your story—great job!
I don't know who you are.
I'll follow you if you follow me back.

content.explanation: 正确答案用 'I saw it on your story' 表达了间接关注，符合非正式语境中常见的委婉回应。选项2过于冷漠，选项3时间错误（不确认当前状态），选项4带有交易语气，不符合自然社交表达。
content.speakerText: Hey, did you hit follow on my TikTok? I posted that dance challenge!
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，你关注我TikTok了吗？我发了那个舞蹈挑战！
